business.title: Trade setup for April 21: NIFTY50 forms doji pattern on daily chart, can it bounce back?
business.description: The NIFTY50 index formed a doji candlestick pattern on Monday, indicating indecision on the direction of the market. The GIFT NIFTY futures opened 48 points lower on Tuesday morning, suggesting a negative opening for Indian markets.

science.title: We now know how moss leaves grow
science.description: A study reveals that mosses and thale cress, a small flowering plant, share the same leaf growth principles, despite 400 million years of separate evolution.

science.title: Targeting glutamine metabolism enhances CAR-macrophage cancer therapy
science.description: Tumor-associated macrophages (TAMs) within the tumor microenvironment (TME) exhibit significant metabolic dysregulation, which impairs their antitumor function.

science.title: NASA rolls out core stage for the next mission to the moon: Artemis III
science.description: It's been a week since the crew of Artemis II (2) dropped back to earth after a record-breaking mission, but concrete steps are already being taken to achieve the next phase of NASA's lunar goals. The Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans has rolled out the largest section of NASA's Space Launch System rocket, which will launch a second crewed mission known as Artemis III (3).

science.title: Diamond Stretch Yields Path for Ultra-Precise Sensors
science.description: Researchers have discovered a new way to tune the quantum properties of tiny defects in diamond – by gently stretching or compressing the crystal

science.title: Balding? New plant-based serum delivers 25% hair regrowth in 56 days, study finds
science.description: Researchers tested a daily hair serum using plant extracts and growth signals, finding improved hair density and thickness in eight weeks. While results are encouraging, the short trial and lack of comparison with existing treatments mean more evidence is needed.

science.title: Scientists Identify Gene Behind Limb Regeneration, Moving Closer to Human Application
science.description: Scientists identified SP8, a key gene behind limb regeneration, moving research closer to human application.

science.title: NASA confirms a "bus-sized" asteroid to pass Earth on April 21-Is It Dangerous?
science.description: A bus-sized asteroid (2026 HJ1) will pass Earth on April 21, 2026. NASA says it is safe, with no impact risk. Know what it is, why it’s approaching Earth and how it is being tracked by NASA.

science.title: Scientists disrupt key cancer proteins to target neuroblastoma
science.description: Researchers at Linköping University show how two important cancer-related proteins can be prevented from collaborating with each other.

ai.title: Apple names insider John Ternus as CEO, Cook to become executive chairman
ai.description: Apple has named John Ternus as its new CEO, replacing Tim Cook who will become executive chairman. Ternus, a longtime insider and key player in the development of major Apple products, will now prioritize enhancing artificial intelligence capabilities. This change in leadership signals a shift towards AI for the company.
